\tzpentry{ID3387}{Chemical Potential Expectation Value}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3387 introduces Chemical Potential Expectation Value as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ R_{$\mu$\nu} - \tfrac{1}{2}R\,g_{$\mu$\nu} + \Lambda_{\text{eff}}(r)\,g_{$\mu$\nu} = \frac{8\pi G}{c^4}\,\langle T_{$\mu$\nu}\rangle_{\text{TZP}}, \]
